description: The Texture3DAssetMetadata component is able to retrieve the 3D texture data like size, memory, and format usually seen at the bottom of an inspector on a particular component as usable values.

fields.Texture: The texture to get Asset Metadata for.
fields.Depth: The depth or Z of ``Texture`` in pixels.
fields.MemoryBytes: How many bytes of memory ``Texture`` takes up.
fields.FormattedMemoryBytes: The bytes that ``Texture`` uses in easy to read human format.
fields.Format: The format that ``Texture`` is kept in.
fields.ActualLoadedVariant: The variant of ``Texture`` that has been loaded, which can be different on a client due to graphics settings or variants are being calculated on the cloud.
fields.Profile: The color space ``Texture`` is rendered in.
